topic: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

exercises.hindiScript: उन्होंने अपना homework कर लिया है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She has been working for two hours.
I am eating food right now.

exercises.audioScript: They have been playing since morning.
exercises.hindiScript: वे सुबह से खेल रहे हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They go to school every day.
I have been reading this book for three hours.
They have been playing since morning.
exercises.answer: They have been playing since morning.

exercises.hindiScript: मैं हर सुबह exercise करता हूँ।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I have been studying for an hour.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She goes to work every day.

exercises.hindiScript: मैंने यह किताब पढ़ ली है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They have been playing since morning.
He has sung a new song.

exercises.audioScript: I have been reading this book for three hours.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं तीन घंटे से यह किताब पढ़ रहा हूँ।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He has been singing for half an hour.
I have been reading this book for three hours.
exercises.answer: I have been reading this book for three hours.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She has been working for two hours.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I am eating food right now.
They go to school every day.

dictationPassage.text: They have done their homework. They have been playing since morning. I exercise every morning. I am reading now. I have read this book.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: उन्होंने अपना homework कर लिया है। वे सुबह से खेल रहे हैं। मैं हर सुबह exercise करता हूँ। मैं अभी पढ़ रहा हूँ। मैंने यह किताब पढ़ ली है।
